title: MachineSceneDescriptor
description: Schema for describing a 3D machine assembly for AI generation and rendering.

machine_name.description: The name of the machine being described.

assembly_instructions.description: General description of how the machine is put together.

metadata.description: Any extra information related to the machine.

parts.description: A list of parts that make up the machine.

shape.description: The geometry type of the part.

size.description: Dimensions based on shape: [width, height, depth] for box, [radius, height] for cylinder, [radius] for sphere.

material.description: Material type or visual description of the part.

role.description: Functional explanation of what this part does in the machine.

connections.description: List of part IDs that this part is connected to.
